CMake toolchain file for building with OpenWrt on MIPS architecture using mipsel-openwrt-linux-gcc.

# Purpose
This configuration file is used to set up the build environment for a project targeting the OpenWrt operating system on a MIPS architecture. It specifies the system name as `Openwrt` and the system processor as `mips`, which informs the build system about the target platform. The file also sets the C compiler to `mipsel-openwrt-linux-gcc`, indicating that the cross-compilation toolchain for MIPS architecture should be used. This setup is essential for ensuring that the software is compiled correctly for the intended hardware and operating system.
